description_long: This is a three-seat sofa upholstered in a light green fabric with a repeating white circular geometric pattern. The sofa features three individual seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be loose and uniform in size. The armrests are wide, straight, and padded, extending to the same height as the backrest, and are also covered in the same patterned fabric. The back of the sofa is fully upholstered and slightly angled, providing a continuous and supportive structure. The legs are short, cylindrical, and positioned at the corners, barely visible beneath the base. The overall design is modern and inviting, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, three-seat sofa with light green upholstery featuring a white circular geometric pattern, wide padded armrests, and three uniform seat and back cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat and back cushions, wide padded armrests, and the patterned upholstery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's armrest thickness, cushion depth, and the continuous patterned fabric.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full backrest covered in the geometric pattern and the sofa's overall width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion depth, with the same patterned fabric visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual, loose seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all uniform in size and evenly spaced across the sofa.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight, and padded armrests at each end, extending to the same height as the backrest, fully upholstered in the patterned fabric.
attribute_leg_design: Short, cylindrical legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of metal or wood, with a simple and unobtrusive design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three loose, uniform cushions and no visible tufting or decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Light green fabric with a repeating white circular geometric pattern, creating a visually distinctive and modern look.
